impact: This advances the PP&D plan by creating the handoff boundary between PP&D crawl policy/frontier data and the reusable ipfs_datasets_py web archive/legal scraper processors, while keeping processor implementation out of ppd/ and validating that the manifest contains no raw crawl output or private DevHub artifacts.
summary: Add a deterministic PP&D crawl-to-processor handoff manifest fixture and validator for mapping public seed URLs to ipfs_datasets_py processor jobs.
target_task: Task checkbox-43: Add a crawl-to-processor handoff manifest fixture that maps public PP&D seed URLs to `ipfs_datasets_py` web archive / legal scraper processor jobs without forking processor implementation into `ppd/`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
